title: piriqueta cistoides var. genuina
intro: Piriqueta cistoides var. genuina, also known as 'False Tillandsia' or 'Purple False Tillandsia', is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. Traditionally, Piriqueta cistoides var. genuina has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, asthma, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have anti-cancer properties. Piriqueta cistoides var. genuina is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in capsule or powder form.
